title: [W] Representative for the group claim
p1: [W] The tribunal will usually communicate with one person in the claimant party. If you do not have a legal representative, this can be an individual in the group claim. That individual will act as the representative for the group.
p2: [W] The group claim representative is responsible for:
bullet1: [W] receiving all communication as the claim progresses
bullet2: [W] making requests and applications to the tribunal
bullet3: [W] telling the other individuals in the group claim when there are updates to the claim
p3: [W] You can change the representative, or add a legal representative as the claim progresses.

p4.start: [W] If you have a legal representative, they must complete the

legend: [W] Do you agree to be the group claim representative?
yes: [W] Yes, I agree to being the group claim representative
no: [W] No, I do not agree to being the group claim representative
noHint: [W] If the claim is accepted, the tribunal will contact all parties to discuss who should be the group representative.

leadClaimant.required: [W] Tell us if you agree to be the group claim representative
